structurePatterns: Arrow = 8px triangle pointing to the trigger element
Dismisses on click outside or Esc key
usageHints: Use for temporary contextual info — not for critical actions
Popover is NOT an alert — never put warnings in a popover
Do NOT stack popovers (no cascading popovers)
doNotInvent: Modal behavior — popovers are non-modal by design
Blue headers or accent bars in popover
unknowns: Popover with scrollable content max height
